title: Creamy Festive Fig Stir-fry
description: A peppery, creamy festive Slovakian dish featuring figs, toast and jain-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: figs
ingredients.notes: use fresh or dried if available

ingredients.name: cream cheese
ingredients.notes: plain or flavored with garlic and herbs

ingredients.name: red onion
ingredients.notes: finely chopped for color and texture

instructions: Toast toast crumbs in the oven for about 5 minutes or until golden brown.
In a skillet, sauté garlic and red onion over medium heat until softened.
Add figs and continue cooking until soft. Mince them if not already done.
Blend cream cheese with minced figs and any additional ingredients like pepper flakes, herbs (if using), to taste.
Stir in the toasted toast crumbs into the creamy mixture.
Cook for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally until everything is heated through and well combined.
